data.title: Retail investors dump Apple stock, favoring Nvidia and Tesla with $15 billion net purchase since July 2025. Appleverse news roundup.
data.description: In recent tech and entertainment news, Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) is observing a downturn in retail investor interest, while Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) are experiencing massive inflows. Since July 2025, Nvidia has witnessed a staggering $15 billion in retail purchases, surpassing all other Magnificent 7 companies combined. Meanwhile, Tesla saw $6 billion in net retail buys, indicating a notable shift in investor preferences within the tech sector. On another note, Netflix Inc. (NASDAQ: NFLX) and Apple have both secured Best Picture Oscar nominations, with Netflix garnering 16 nods. More details on this news piece can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Trump backs A.I. data centers; GOP and locals oppose mega center like 18 Walmarts in Alabama woodland. Residents fear loss of nature.
data.description: Beside Bessemer, Alabama, a dispute arises as residents express strong opposition to the construction of a massive data center equivalent in size to 18 Walmart stores. The planned facility is proposed to be erected in a pristine woodland area. A resident lamented, "All of this natural beauty will vanish once the data center is built."

data.title: THC drink sales soar in January. Rising demand for non-alcoholic buzz with hemp-derived THC. Federal law threatens sales surge.
data.description: There has been a noticeable increase in the sales of beverages containing THC derived from hemp, as consumers seek alternative options for intoxication. This trend is particularly appealing to individuals looking for a high without consuming alcohol. However, these products may face challenges as a new federal regulation could potentially remove them from store shelves.

data.title: Farmers in Mississippi Delta facing tough times as crop prices fall below production costs, especially for rice.
data.description: The costs of production for most key U.S. crops exceed their current market prices. The recent decrease in rice prices is particularly concerning for farmers in Mississippi, further impacting the already struggling agricultural sector in the region.

data.title: Colombia's second-largest pension fund to provide access to Bitcoin-linked fund for qualified investors, without altering core savings allocation.
data.description: Access to the Bitcoin-linked fund by AFP Protección will be restricted to qualified investors, without affecting the primary allocation of Colombian pension savings.

data.title: Halfpricesoft.com offers ezW2 2025 software with W-2 and 1099 Efile service to simplify tax filing. Available now in Redmond, Wash.
data.description: The recently released ezW2 2025 software comes equipped with a convenient W-2 and 1099 Efile service to help meet upcoming deadlines. Available for a test drive now, this software aims to streamline year-end and tax-season filings. The software, provided by Halfpricesoft.com, assists users in securely filing their W-2 and 1099 forms. This announcement was made on January 25, 2026, in REDMOND, Washington.

data.title: AAVE price prediction: $190-195 target by Feb 2026 despite bearish trend. Caution at $155 support.
data.description: Analysts have mixed predictions for the price of AAVE, aiming for a target range of $190-195 by February 2026. However, caution is advised due to current technical indicators pointing towards potential support levels at $155, coupled with bearish MACD momentum.

data.description: Lido DAO is displaying positive MACD signals despite the ongoing bearish trend, as analysts predict a target price range of $0.75 to $0.85. This represents a potential increase of 45-64% from the current price levels.

data.description: According to various cryptocurrency analysts, there is a forecast that PEPE may surge to $0.00000690 by January 31, 2026. This projected increase could yield gains of approximately 30-35%, despite the current neutral technical signals for the digital asset.

data.title: WLD expected to rise to $0.62-$0.73 by Feb 2026. Currently trading at $0.47, oversold conditions signal bounce.

data.title: Nifty Gateway, a once-popular NFT marketplace owned by Gemini, will shut down on Feb. 23, 2026, due to the sector’s downturn.
data.description: On February 23, 2026, the NFT platform owned by Gemini is set to shut down, joining the list of major casualties in the sector due to the extended downturn. After this date, the platform will only allow for withdrawals.

data.title: Aptos (APT) at $1.55, may hit $2.10 short-term and $2.43 medium-term despite oversold conditions.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Aptos (APT) is currently trading at $1.55, with technical indicators signaling oversold conditions. Analysts predict a short-term recovery target price of $2.00-$2.10 and anticipate a medium-term potential to reach $2.43.
